VIX 19.16 rising (MID regime, above bear entry threshold 17.30). All prior support levels from June 2-3 (~754-760 area) irrelevant — market moved ~$15-20 lower during missed sessions June 4-5. Today's structure: morning rally to 745.33 session high (11:05 ET), then sustained sell-off breaking 740.80 support late session. Bear continuation setup into tomorrow unless 740.80 reclaimed. SWARM UNAVAILABLE (all agents failed). surprises: Premarket scheduled task fired at 15:21 ET (scheduled 08:30) — entire RTH session operated without morning key levels, bias context, or falsifiable hypothesis

Morning bounce to 745.33 then clean sustained sell-off to 738.91 — clean bear tape with no chop, optimal BEARISH_REJECTION conditions, but no levels loaded to arm setup
lesson: Silent premarket failure is the highest-risk pipeline configuration: heartbeat operates in structurally degraded state (no key levels, no hypothesis) with no external alert. Watchdog needed: check today-bias.json written before 09:00 ET, write CRITICAL to STATUS.md if not.
